top_issues.issue: Arm too low — raise your elbow higher for better arc
Wrist not above elbow — ball will drift sideways
Arm at max elevation — normal at follow-through

recommendations: Work on Elbow angle: Chicken wing elbow — arm flares, reducing arc and accuracy
Work on Knee bend: Legs too straight — shot relies on arms only, loses range
Work on Shoulder elevation: Shoulder over-elevated — creates tension and side-spin risk

feedback.shoulder_angle: Arm at max elevation — normal at follow-through
feedback.wrist_elbow_vertical: Wrist not above elbow — ball will drift sideways
